data.body: PUSHED full 6-stack: 653=c366,654=28f1,655=4cdf,656=7ed9,659=d6bd,663=5566. Gerrit status: LLM-Review=+MAX (PASS) on all reviewed; Verified=-1 (CI FAIL) on 653-659; 663 CI pending. CI failure = 2 PRE-EXISTING FLAKY timing tests: grounding test_worker_hard_crash_maps_to_parse_error (got timeout vs parse_error under CI load) + reconciler test_acli_subprocess_timeout. Proof they're flakes not regressions: (a) both PASS locally (15 passed), (b) inconsistent across py3.11/3.12/3.13, (c) 653=c366 (touches only completion_floor+docs) failed on the RECONCILER timeout test — impossible for my change to cause. Posting recheck on 653-659.
